words.definition: A planned route or schedule of events for a trip
words.example: The tour guide handed out the itinerary for our three-day trip.

words.definition: The place to which someone or something is travelling
words.example: Paris is one of the most visited tourist destinations in the world.

words.definition: A place where travellers can stay, such as a hotel or hostel
words.example: We booked accommodation close to the city centre for three nights.

words.definition: The official inspection of luggage and goods at a border crossing
words.example: We had to declare all food items when passing through customs.

words.definition: The process of getting onto a plane, ship, or other vehicle
words.example: Boarding begins forty-five minutes before the scheduled departure.

words.definition: A stop or waiting period between two connecting flights
words.example: We have a three-hour layover in Amsterdam before our final flight.

words.definition: The system of money used in a particular country or region
words.example: Make sure to exchange your currency before arriving at your destination.

words.definition: Travelling through a place on the way to another destination
words.example: Passengers in transit do not need to collect their checked luggage.

words.definition: A well-known or easily recognised building, structure, or feature
words.example: The Eiffel Tower is one of Paris's most iconic landmarks.

words.definition: The price charged for a journey by public transport
words.example: The bus fare has increased significantly since last year.

words.definition: Tiredness and confusion caused by travelling across multiple time zones
words.example: After the twelve-hour flight, I suffered badly from jet lag.

words.definition: A short trip or journey made for pleasure, usually as part of a holiday
words.example: We went on a guided boat excursion along the coast.

words.definition: Irregular and violent movement of air that causes a plane to shake
words.example: We experienced moderate turbulence over the Atlantic Ocean.

words.definition: A person who lives and works in a country other than their own
words.example: There is a large expatriate community living and working in Dubai.

words.definition: To leave your own country permanently in order to live in another
words.example: They decided to emigrate to Canada in search of better opportunities.
